progress_summary: Fifth bug-check run on this project. Diff is the skill-page Updated-badge change (site/src/lib/skills.ts + site/src/pages/skills/[id].astro). Ran the full check suite: vitest (15 files, 108/108 passed), astro check (4 pre-existing errors in flags/registry.ts which is gitignored generated code, none from this diff), site build via npm run prebuild + npm run site:build (25 pages clean — verified the new <time datetime="…">Updated May 2, 2026</time> badge renders on /skills/deploy-ops next to v1.0.0 matching the actual #161 merge timestamp), anti-pattern grep on staged diff (clean — no console.log/debugger/.only/@ts-ignore/empty catch in added lines), secret scan clean, npm audit clean (0 vulnerabilities). Verdict PASS.

key_decisions: Source-touching commit — ran the full applicable check suite (tests, build, type-check, anti-patterns, secrets, deps).
ESLint skipped because the repo has no eslint config; relying on astro check and tsc-via-astro for type/lint signal.
The 4 astro-check errors are in site/src/lib/flags/registry.ts which is generated by scripts/gen-flags.mjs and gitignored — not introduced by this diff.

next_actions: If a future commit changes package.json or package-lock.json, run npm audit --audit-level=critical as part of bug-check.
If eslint config is added to the repo, wire it into bug-check's lint step.

notes: astro check: 4 pre-existing errors in gitignored flags/registry.ts; 0 errors in the diff itself.
anti-patterns: clean on staged diff (no console.log/debugger/.only/@ts-ignore/empty catch in added lines).
build: npm run prebuild + npm run site:build green; verified Updated badge renders in /skills/deploy-ops/index.html.
